LanguageData.ComaDrug.label: Coma Drug
LanguageData.ComaDrug.description: A neurodegenerative drug that induces a medical coma for 5.55 days.
LanguageData.ComaDrugHigh.label: Coma Drug Effect
LanguageData.ComaDrugHigh.description: Causes a Drug-induced coma that lasts 5.55 days.
LanguageData.ComaDrugHigh.stages.MedicalComa.label: Medical Coma
